## 2.0.0

- Enhance Redis provider
- Clear Redis password from memory after authentication
- Apply TTL eviction in `MemoryProvider`
- Honor TTL in `RedisProvider` via `SET … PX`
- Upgrade `mineral` dependency to `^5.0.0`

## 1.2.0

- Create release candidate from core

## 1.1.0-dev.1

- upgrade `core` dependency

## 1.0.0-dev.3

- Change contracts according to `core`
- Change `core` version

## 1.0.0-dev.2

- Move package to src folder
- Add `memory` import namespace
- Add `redis` import namespace
- Change absolute file imports to core namespaces

## 1.0.0-dev.1

- Add some changes

## 1.0.0

- Initial version.
